title: Picture Hanging Strips Heavy Duty 20 Pairs(40 Strips,XL),Damage Free Hanging Adhesive Strips,Mounting Tapes Removable,No Nails for Picture Photo Frames Hanger
features: A+B Hanging Adhesive Strips: Our Picture hanging strips (20 pairs/40 strips), which can be used instead of nails or liquid adhesive to avoid problems with holes, glue residue and marks, and keep the wall beautiful. The combination A (Hook)+B (Loop) can be attached or detached repeatedly, making it easy to move and adjust.

Easy to Use: Summerbrite wall hanging strips can attach picture frames, decorative paintings, billboards, wall clocks, mirrors, shelves, decorations, rugs, and other items without the need for nails, screws, hammers, and other tools. Our wall stickers for picture hanging is suitable for various smooth surfaces, such as painted walls, ceramic tile, glass, metal, plastic, and wooden doors.

Damage Free Hanging: The foam glue is stretchy. Simply press the top of the band and then pull the band vertically in the direction of the mark. The adhesive of the double sided tape strength will gradually disappear without damaging the surface and the strips can be removed with ease. The surface will remain clean, free of residue.

Heavy Duty Adhesive Tape: The size of the extra wide picture hanging adhesive strip (XL) is 10cm x 2cm to fit more scenes. 4 pairs of bands can support a maximum weight of 6.8kg. The sealing level of the adhesive backing is IPX7, and the temperature of the working environment is -10°C to 65°C.

Tips: Make sure the surface is smooth and dry before using, do not use it on wet, rough and porous surfaces; Do not hang valuables or dangerous items. increase the pressure time and force to make the bond safer and more stable; Make sure that the weight of hanging objects is within the tolerance range.
